summary: Completed testing of Bulk Delete functionality for Doctors, Medicals, and Agencies pages. All backend API tests (11/11 passed) and frontend UI tests verified successfully.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue (existing from previous iteration)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_BulkDoctor, TEST_BulkMedical, TEST_BulkAgency test data for API testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk delete fully implemented and tested for all three entity types. Key features: 1) Checkbox in table header for Select All. 2) Individual checkboxes in each row. 3) 'Delete (N)' button appears when items selected. 4) Bulk Delete confirmation modal shows warning and count. 5) Backend POST endpoints: /api/doctors/bulk-delete, /api/medicals/bulk-delete, /api/agencies/bulk-delete accept array of IDs. 6) Related notes and tasks are also deleted. 7) Empty ID array returns 400 error.

doctors_checkboxes.details: Select All checkbox in table header and individual checkboxes in each row work correctly

doctors_bulk_delete_button.details: Delete (N) button appears when items selected, shows correct count, hidden when deselected

doctors_bulk_delete_modal.details: Modal shows title 'Delete N Doctor(s)', warning message about action being irreversible, Cancel and Delete buttons

doctors_bulk_delete_api.details: POST /api/doctors/bulk-delete accepts array of IDs and deletes records with associated notes/tasks

medicals_checkboxes.details: Select All and individual checkboxes work on Medicals page (table view)

medicals_bulk_delete_button.details: Delete (N) button appears correctly on Medicals page

agencies_checkboxes.details: Select All and individual checkboxes work on Agencies page (table view)

agencies_bulk_delete_button.details: Delete (N) button appears correctly on Agencies page

api_tests.test_03_doctors_bulk_delete_verifies_del: PASS - GET returns 404 for deleted doctor IDs
